title: lomatophyllum macrum
intro: Lomatophyllum macrum, also known as the Velvet Elephant's Trunk, is a succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, while also being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Lomatophyllum macrum include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties in a more concentrated form.
